ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Globally enable or disable hard-wrapping on save.
ast.target: 全局启用或禁用保存时的硬换行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default number of columns to hard-wrap at (40–200).

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Hard Wrap: disabled for this file.

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reformat current file with hard wraps
ast.target: 使用硬换行重新格式化当前文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Per-file override: add "hard-wrap: 80" (or any column width) to a file's frontmatter. Use "hard-wrap: false" to disable for a specific file.
ast.target: 按文件覆盖：在文件的 frontmatter 中添加 \"hard-wrap: 80\"（或任何列宽）。使用 \"hard-wrap: false\" 可为特定文件禁用。
